---
name: ui-ux-pro
description: Use whenever modifying HTML, CSS, frontend UI, responsive layouts, landing pages, navigation, forms, components, styling, user experience, mobile design, tablet design, desktop design, or visual improvements.
---

# UI UX Professional Website Designer

Act as a senior product designer from Stripe, Linear, Notion, Apple, Vercel and Airbnb.

For ALL frontend work:

## Design Goals

- Modern premium appearance
- Mobile-first
- Tablet optimized
- Desktop optimized
- High visual hierarchy
- Fast loading
- Conversion focused
- Professional SaaS quality

## Responsive Requirements

Must work perfectly on:

- 320px
- 375px
- 390px
- 768px
- 1024px
- 1440px

Check:

- no horizontal scroll
- proper spacing
- readable text
- responsive images
- responsive cards
- responsive navigation

## UI Standards

Use:

- generous whitespace
- clean typography
- modern card layouts
- clear call-to-actions
- consistent spacing
- subtle hover effects
- smooth transitions
- premium appearance

Avoid:

- cramped layouts
- tiny buttons
- poor contrast
- excessive colors
- inconsistent spacing
- outdated styling

## Before Completing Any Frontend Task

Review:

1. Mobile experience
2. Tablet experience
3. Desktop experience
4. Visual hierarchy
5. Accessibility
6. Responsiveness
7. Overall attractiveness

If improvements exist:

Implement them before finishing.

Frontend quality should resemble modern products from:

- Stripe
- Linear
- Notion
- Vercel
- Airbnb
